summary: Iteration 31 - Logo Integration & Bulk Upload Features Testing Complete. 10/12 backend tests passed (1 failed, 1 skipped). All frontend features verified working. Logo appears correctly on Login page (white card), Admin sidebar, Partner sidebar, Case Manager sidebar, and Client header. Bulk upload features working: drag-drop zone, Browse Files button with multiple=true, staging area with per-file document type and step dropdowns, Upload All and Clear All buttons.

minor.issue: Commission report PDF is only 2KB - logo is NOT included. The _generate_commission_pdf function in pdf_reports.py does not include the logo Image element like _generate_sales_pdf does.
Test skipped - no sales with payment transactions exist in database to test receipt PDF generation

action_items: FIX: Add logo to _generate_commission_pdf function in /app/backend/routers/pdf_reports.py (line 99-143) - currently missing Image element that exists in _generate_sales_pdf
critical_code_review_comments: Commission PDF generation (_generate_commission_pdf) is missing logo - needs to add Image element like in _generate_sales_pdf
Sales report PDF correctly includes logo (verified 200KB+ file size)
Payment receipt PDF includes logo code but couldn't be tested due to no transactions in DB

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all logo and bulk upload features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 tested logo integration and bulk upload features. PASSED: (1) Login page logo in white card, (2) Admin sidebar logo 40x40px, (3) Partner sidebar logo 40x40px, (4) Case Manager sidebar logo 40x40px, (5) Client header logo 40x40px, (6) Sales report PDF with logo (200KB+), (7) Bulk upload drag-drop zone, (8) Browse Files with multiple=true, (9) Staging area with per-file dropdowns, (10) Upload All and Clear All buttons, (11) Backend bulk-upload endpoint with document_types and step_names JSON arrays. FAILED: Commission report PDF missing logo (only 2KB). SKIPPED: Payment receipt PDF test (no transactions in DB). Logo files exist at /app/frontend/public/leamss-logo.png and /app/backend/uploads/leamss-logo.png (both 185KB).
